message: Add CI workflow for automated testing and building, include test script in package.json, and normalize line terminators in markdown output

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,114 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    tags: ['v*']
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+env:
+  BUN_VERSION: latest
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    name: Lint, typecheck, test
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
+        with:
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Lint
+        run: bun run lint
+
+      - name: Type check
+        run: bun run typecheck
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: bun run test
+
+  build:
+    name: Build native binaries (${{ matrix.os }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    needs: test
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            artifact: csctm-linux
+          - os: macos-latest
+            artifact: csctm-macos
+          - os: windows-latest
+            artifact: csctm-windows.exe
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        shell: bash
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
+        with:
+          bun-version: ${{ env.BUN_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: bun run build
+
+      - name: Prepare artifact
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p artifacts
+          # Bun emits .exe on Windows; otherwise the binary is named csctm.
+          BIN_PATH="dist/csctm"
+          if [ -f "dist/csctm.exe" ]; then
+            BIN_PATH="dist/csctm.exe"
+          fi
+          mv "$BIN_PATH" "artifacts/${{ matrix.artifact }}"
+
+      - name: Upload artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          path: artifacts/${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          if-no-files-found: error
+
+  release:
+    name: Create GitHub release
+    if: github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: build
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Download artifacts
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: artifacts
+
+      - name: List artifacts
+        run: ls -lh artifacts
+
+      - name: Create release with gh
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          FILES=$(find artifacts -type f -maxdepth 2 -print)
+          gh release create "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" $FILES --title "Release ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" --notes "Automated release for ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
+

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@
     "build:all": "bun run build:mac-arm64 && bun run build:mac-x64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:windows-x64",
     "lint": "bunx eslint src",
     "typecheck": "bunx tsc --noEmit",
+    "test": "bun test",
     "check": "bun run lint && bun run typecheck",
     "dev": "bun run src/index.ts"
   },
